Affordable RV &
Tiny Home
Communities

Monthly stays, covered RV sites, and comfortable community living across five West Texas locations — built for travel nurses, contractors, oilfield workers, and long-term residents.

View Locations Covered Sites Reserve Online

Buck Creek Communities operates five West Texas parks offering affordable monthly housing with full hookups, pet-friendly sites, and big-rig-friendly pull-through access along the I-20 corridor and beyond.

Select locations offer online booking through Firefly Reservations. Others are booked directly by phone or email — we keep it simple.

Community Living

More than a parking spot

Buck Creek Communities offers more than RV spaces. Our parks feature well-kept roads, open space, and move-in-ready tiny home options at select locations — built for long-term comfort, not overnight stays.

Whether you're a travel nurse on assignment, a contractor working the I-20 corridor, or someone looking for an affordable monthly home base, Buck Creek has a place for you.

Full hookups — 30 & 50 amp at all locations
Big-rig friendly, 40ft+ pull-through sites
Pet friendly communities
Free park-wide Wi-Fi
Move-in-ready tiny home options at Abilene
On-site management at key locations
